# Operator Pack — Quote Followup

## Primary Goal
Book qualified demos

## Target Personas
- VP Sales
- Head of Sales
- RevOps Director
- Sales Ops Leader
- Inside Sales Manager

## Channels
- Cold email (primary)
- LinkedIn manual (secondary)
- LinkedIn lead forms (tertiary)

## CTA
Book 15-minute audit via Calendly

## Qualified Lead Definition
ICP match + company fit + pain present + action taken (booking or requesting workflow-specific detail)

## SLA Protocol
- Email replies: under 4 hours
- LinkedIn DMs: under 4 hours
- LinkedIn comments: under 2 hours
- Landing page chat: under 15 minutes
- Demo booking review: under 2 hours
